name: Thales/Imperva
notes:
Imperva, a division of Thales, provides cyber security services including Cloud Web Application Firewall (CWAF), DDoS mitigation, Advanced Bot Protection (ABP), and API security. We are happy to peer with ISPs, cloud providers, other security applications, and any other network that AS 19551 exchanges traffic with.

We prefer 50 Mbps of recent peak traffic to configure bilateral sessions as our announcements are the same whether over IX route services, bilateral sessions, or PNI.
